---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for the prediction platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when I try to ingest forex data and..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. E.g. "Add a support vector machine model to the training center."

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup layouts, or papers about the indicator/model here.
